findings.evidence: New public theorem at `code/TauCeti/Analysis/InnerProductSpace/Laplacian.lean:72`; Mathlib already has `@[simp] theorem AffineIsometryEquiv.map_vadd` at `mathlib/Mathlib/Analysis/Normed/Affine/Isometry.lean:598`, and the new theorem is just `e.map_vadd (0 : E) x` specialized to additive vector spaces.
findings.fix: Do not expose this theorem; replace its uses by `simpa using e.map_vadd (0 : E) x` or keep only local/private helper code in the files that need it.
findings.issue: `affineIsometryEquiv_apply_eq_add` is exported as new TauCeti API even though it is only a proof helper for decomposing affine isometries and duplicates the existing affine-isometry `map_vadd` interface.

summary: The invariance API itself is now bidirectional at point and set level, but the PR exposes an implementation helper unrelated to the named downstream interface.
